Job Description: Site Reliability Engineer for e-commerce platform. Required: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty, and Python. Must define and enforce SLOs, conduct blameless post-mortems, automate toil, and improve system observability. Experience with chaos engineering (Chaos Monkey, Litmus) and capacity planning.

Data Engineer for analytics infrastructure. Required: Python, dbt, Airflow, SQL, and Snowflake or Redshift. Must design dimensional data models, build ELT pipelines, manage data catalog (Atlan or DataHub), and ensure data quality across the platform. Experience with data governance and stakeholder management.

GCP Data and ML Platform Engineer. Required: Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Dataflow, Vertex AI, GKE, Cloud Run), Terraform, and Python. Experience building data and ML pipelines on GCP, managing IAM, and optimizing costs. GCP Professional Data Engineer or ML Engineer certification preferred.

Rust Systems Engineer for low-latency trading infrastructure. Required: Rust, async programming (Tokio), and experience with systems programming, memory management, and performance optimization. Must build high-throughput, low-latency financial data processing systems. Familiarity with FIX protocol or market data feeds is a plus.

Kotlin Backend Developer for Android and server-side applications. Required: Kotlin, Ktor or Spring Boot, coroutines, and PostgreSQL. Experience with gRPC, Protocol Buffers, and building SDK libraries. Familiarity with Kotlin Multiplatform is a bonus. Must write idiomatic Kotlin and apply functional programming patterns.

Android Engineer. Required: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Android SDK, and experience with MVVM and Clean Architecture. Must integrate REST APIs using Retrofit, manage local storage with Room, and implement WorkManager for background tasks. Experience with in-app purchases, push notifications (FCM), and Google Play deployment.

Node.js Backend Engineer for real-time applications. Required: Node.js, TypeScript, Express or Fastify, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Socket.IO. Experience with event-driven architecture, building APIs at scale, and managing async concurrency. Must implement comprehensive logging, error handling, and API versioning strategies.

Mobile QA Engineer. Required: Appium or XCUITest/Espresso, Python or Java, and experience testing iOS and Android applications. Must design end-to-end test suites, integrate with CI pipelines, and conduct exploratory testing. Experience with device farms (BrowserStack, AWS Device Farm) and crash reporting tools (Crashlytics).

Streaming Data Engineer. Required: Apache Kafka, Flink or Spark Streaming, Python, and cloud-native messaging services. Experience with exactly-once semantics, stateful stream processing, and building real-time dashboards. Familiarity with CDC tools (Debezium) and schema registries (Confluent Schema Registry) required.

Go Engineer for high-performance infrastructure services. Required: Go, gRPC, Protobuf, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Experience building concurrent, high-throughput services, writing benchmarks, and profiling Go applications. Familiarity with etcd, Consul, or Kubernetes operators is a plus. Must write clean, idiomatic Go code with comprehensive testing.

Analytics Engineer (dbt specialist). Required: dbt (Core or Cloud), SQL, Snowflake or BigQuery, and Python. Must design modular, well-documented dbt models, implement data testing, and manage the semantic layer. Experience with data observability tools (Monte Carlo, Elementary) and working closely with analysts.

Backend Java Engineer for enterprise financial systems. Required: Java 17+, Spring Boot, Hibernate, Apache Kafka, and PostgreSQL. Must design RESTful microservices, implement event-driven patterns, and ensure high transaction throughput. Experience with JVM performance tuning, Spring Security, and containerization with Docker and Kubernetes.

iOS Engineer. Required: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, and experience publishing apps to the App Store. Must implement MVVM or TCA architecture patterns, integrate REST APIs, and optimize app performance. Experience with Core Data, Push Notifications, and App Store Connect. Familiarity with Swift Concurrency (async/await) required.

Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET). Required: Python or Java, Selenium or Playwright for UI automation, and REST API testing (Postman, RestAssured). Experience with CI/CD integration, performance testing (JMeter or k6), and test reporting frameworks. Must define test strategies, write reusable test frameworks, and champion quality culture.

Full Stack TypeScript Developer (Node.js + React). Required: TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Prisma. Experience with tRPC or GraphQL, Zod for schema validation, and Turborepo for monorepo management. Must be comfortable with both frontend and backend development and deploy on Vercel or AWS.

Rust Engineer for WebAssembly and edge computing. Required: Rust, WASM, and experience deploying to edge runtimes (Cloudflare Workers, Fastly Compute). Must optimize binary size and startup time, work with WASI interfaces, and build portable, sandboxed applications.

Python is the primary language for this role. Must have deep expertise in Python 3.x, async programming (asyncio, aiohttp), type hints, and modern Python packaging. Experience with FastAPI or Django REST Framework, SQLAlchemy, Celery for background tasks, and pytest for testing. Must follow clean code principles, write well-documented APIs, and participate in architecture design.

Application Security Engineer. Required: SAST/DAST tools (Checkmarx, Burp Suite), Python, and experience with secure SDLC practices. Must conduct code reviews for security vulnerabilities, perform penetration testing on web APIs, and train developers on OWASP Top 10. Bug bounty program experience is valued.

Cloud Security Engineer. Required: AWS/Azure security services, Terraform, and experience with CSPM tools (Prisma Cloud, Wiz). Must implement zero-trust network architecture, manage secrets (HashiCorp Vault), and automate compliance checks. CISSP or CEH certification preferred. Experience with SOC2 and ISO 27001 audits.

AWS Specialist for a large-scale SaaS platform. Required: Deep AWS expertise (EC2, ECS/EKS, RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Lambda, S3, CloudFront, API Gateway), Terraform, and Python. Must design multi-region, fault-tolerant architectures, optimize cloud costs, and implement AWS security best practices. AWS Solutions Architect Professional certification required.

Embedded Systems Engineer. Required: C/C++, RTOS (FreeRTOS or Zephyr), and experience with microcontrollers (ARM Cortex-M, ESP32, STM32). Must design firmware for IoT devices, implement communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C, MQTT), and optimize for low-power operation. Experience with hardware debugging (JTAG, oscilloscope) required.

Senior Data Engineer to build real-time data pipelines. Required: Python, Kafka, Flink or Spark Streaming, and cloud data warehouses (Snowflake or BigQuery). Experience with data modeling, CDC (Change Data Capture), and building reusable pipeline frameworks. Must mentor junior engineers and define data engineering best practices.

Data Engineer proficient in Python and PySpark. Build and maintain ETL pipelines ingesting terabytes of data daily. Required: Python, Apache Spark, Airflow, dbt, and experience with data lakes (S3 + Delta Lake or Iceberg). Must handle schema evolution, data quality checks, and work with both batch and streaming data (Kafka or Kinesis).

Flutter Developer for cross-platform mobile app. Required: Flutter, Dart, and experience building production apps for both iOS and Android. Must work with REST APIs, state management (Riverpod or BLoC), and platform-specific integrations. Experience with Firebase services (Auth, Firestore, Analytics) and CI/CD with Codemagic or Bitrise.

Azure Cloud Engineer for enterprise digital transformation. Required: Azure (AKS, Azure SQL, App Service, Azure Functions, Azure DevOps, Azure AD), Bicep or Terraform, and PowerShell. Experience with hybrid cloud connectivity (ExpressRoute, VPN Gateway) and Azure security (Defender for Cloud, Sentinel). Azure Solutions Architect Expert certification preferred.

Kubernetes Platform Engineer. Required: Kubernetes (CKA/CKAD certified preferred), Helm, ArgoCD, Crossplane, and Terraform. Experience building multi-tenant Kubernetes platforms, implementing RBAC, network policies, and resource quotas. Must design operator patterns, manage cluster upgrades, and support developer teams using the platform.

Backend Developer in Go for a fintech startup. Required: Go, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Docker. Must design payment processing microservices with strong error handling, retries, and idempotency guarantees. Experience with distributed tracing (Jaeger or Tempo) and metrics (Prometheus) is expected.

Solidity Smart Contract Developer. Required: Solidity, Hardhat or Foundry, ethers.js or web3.js, and experience deploying on EVM-compatible chains. Must write gas-optimized, secure smart contracts, conduct security audits, and integrate with DeFi protocols. Experience with ERC standards (ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155) and OpenZeppelin libraries.

Product Analytics specialist. Required: SQL, Python, Amplitude or Mixpanel, and experience with product analytics frameworks (AARRR, HEART). Must design event tracking schemas, build retention and engagement analyses, and collaborate with product managers on metric definition. Experience with funnel optimization and cohort analysis.

Financial Data Analyst. Required: SQL, Python, Excel (advanced), and experience with financial reporting, P&L analysis, and variance reporting. Must build automated financial models, work with ERP data (SAP or Oracle Financials), and present insights to CFO and finance leadership. CFA or CPA background is a plus.

Java Software Engineer for banking core systems. Required: Java, Spring Framework, Oracle DB, and REST APIs. Experience with transaction management, messaging (IBM MQ or ActiveMQ), and legacy system integration. Knowledge of SWIFT protocols or ISO 20022 is a strong plus. Must work in regulated financial environments.
